description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The exterior features a combination of white and natural wood paneling, with large rectangular windows arranged in symmetrical rows across all visible sides. The property is enclosed by a wooden fence and includes a spacious yard with amenities such as a swimming pool, trampoline, swing set, and outdoor lounge areas. The front of the house has a paved driveway leading to a covered carport, and the main entrance is accentuated by a small porch with greenery. The rooftop appears to be partially accessible, with outdoor furniture and open railings, suggesting a terrace or recreational space. The landscaping is minimal but well-maintained, with patches of grass, a few trees, and decorative elements throughout the yard.
description: A modern, three-story house with flat roofs, large windows, wood and white paneling, and a fenced yard featuring a pool, carport, and outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, paved driveway, carport, and a clear view of the fenced yard with a trampoline and swing set.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, side yard with a hammock, and the rear garden area with a circular feature and tree.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, sun loungers, back patio, and symmetrical window arrangement on the house's back facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the pool, trampoline, and the side of the house with additional yard space and outdoor seating.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small porch, paved approach, and minimal decorative greenery.
